callouts.byline: “If you’re the smartest person in the room, you are in the wrong room”
callouts.text:
It’s rare we all get other, but when we do, I’m reminded how lucky we are to work with such brilliant industry minds.

#TeamJRM
callouts.author: Sean McKillop

callouts.byline: Another #Milken Global Conference 2026 in the books!
callouts.text: A special thank you to this management & exec leadership group below for their countless hours and dedication to help keep one of the most high profile global summits safe & secure!
callouts.author: Sean McKillop

callouts.byline: What an incredible run S&S Labor Force Inc. dba JRM
callouts.text:
Providing services at 2 Mega events Back to Back, the BET Awards and the Anime Expo 26.
Really proud of our assembled management and administrative/Logistics teams! 
Both of these Events, present incredible challenges,  we were able to overcome all of them with resilience and team work!
Special thank you to our Clients and Security partners at all the venues and properties for the trust.
callouts.author: Sevan Ohanians

callouts.byline: JRM-NV Security successfully concluded another big weekend in Las Vegas at the 2026 American Music Awards.
callouts.text:
The event was a tremendous success, featuring outstanding performances.

A special thank you to Dick Clark Productions for trusting us with the safety and security of the show. Our collaboration with the MGM Grand Garden Arena team was essential in making this event possible.

This achievement was a total team effort from our security staff. I sincerely appreciate everyone's contributions. Our success is a result of all of you! 

AMA's....This Memorial Day, the American Music Awards honors those who made the ultimate sacrifice while celebrating service and paying tribute to veterans through the 2026 AMA's Salute initiative. This year, the AMA's are proud to partner with 11 of the leading Military & Veterans Service Organizations to spotlight our nation’s heroes and amplify the impact of those who serve this community.
callouts.author: Mike Izquierdo

callouts.text:
JRM-NV concluded a very busy weekend supporting the Rex Group and UFC in the security efforts for Power Slap at the Cosmopolitan and for UFC 329 at T-Mobile Arena.

Thank you JRM-NV staff for your continued dedication and professionalism!
callouts.author: Mike Izquierdo

callouts.text: JRM has managed security operations for the Grammy Awards for 18 consecutive years, most recently for the 68th Grammy Awards at Crypto.com Arena — trusted with one of music's biggest nights, year after year.
callouts.author: JRM Marketing

team.name: John McKillop
team.title: CEO & President
team.bio:
John has over 40 years of experience related to law enforcement and private industry security management.  John’s law enforcement career spanned 20 years of overseeing high level investigations relating to organized crime, gang activity and ended his career supervising the Robbery-Homicide division.  In 2002 he was awarded the honor of being one the top police officer awards in the international law enforcement community by the International Association of Chiefs of Police ( IACP) for his work overseeing and successful prosecution of one of the nation’s most prolific serial killers.

After his law enforcement career John has been serving the private industry and has specialized in entertainment security.  John has been instrumental in creating and implementing security plans for some of the nations largest annual events such as Grammys, Emmys, Billboard Awards, American Music Awards and more.  As CEO and President of S&S Labor Force Inc. Dba JRM, John and his executive team have created a diverse portfolio of security services and is now one of the largest privately owned security companies in the region operating in major markets in the U.S. and other countries.

team.name: Mike Izquierdo
team.title: COO
team.bio: Michael is a retired law enforcement officer from Southern California.  He brings over 30 years of law enforcement and security experience to the table.  His law enforcement career helped shape his critical thinking skills and strong tactical and analytical skills.  Michael is based out of our Las Vegas, NV office.  He has direct oversight of our national operations and branch offices.  His responsibilities include carrying out the strategic goals set by our CEO and Board of Directors.  He works closely with the V.P’s of the company to set our strategy and goals for business growth and development and to look out for the financial health of our company.  Working alongside our CEO, Michael has helped the company become the best and largest live broadcast security company in the U.S.

team.name: Robert Paul Schwartz
team.title: CFO
team.bio: Results-orientated accounting professional with broad experience in a deadline-driven environment. Proven track record in consistently and effectively delivering accounting services that enhance the company's purpose and profitability. Strong technical accounting, tax and computer skills. Excellent research and financial analysis abilities. In-depth management reporting.Developing and implementing financial systems and controls. Budgeting and forecasting. Facilitation of internal and external auditing procedures. Regulatory compliance. Staff management and development. In-depth knowledge of accounting regulations and standards. Robert is an active Certified Public Accountant in California and Oregon with over 40 years of accounting experience. Robert has also held positions as Controller and Chief Financial Officer for a variety of privately held companies.

team.name: Andy Sanders
team.title: Chief of Staff
team.bio: Andy has 20 years’ experience in event security and facility protection with a specialty in venue ingress and weapons detection technology.  His current role capitalizes on his extensive experience in Corporate America and has him oversee a vast portfolio of projects and company wide initiatives.  Andy is responsible for managing the day-to-day operations of the executive office and serving as a trusted advisor to the CEO. His ability to anticipate needs and proactively address challenges allows her to streamline processes, optimize resources, and drive efficient decision-making.

team.name: Sean McKillop
team.title: SVP - Global Events & Development
team.bio: Sean is a highly accomplished and dynamic individual serving as the Vice President of Business Development. With over a decade of experience in the corporate world, he has established himself as a strategic leader in driving growth and forging successful partnerships. His impressive track record includes successfully spearheading numerous business initiatives and expansion projects across the globe. Known for his exceptional networking skills, he has a knack for identifying new opportunities and cultivating strong relationships with key stakeholders. As Vice President of Business Development, Sean is responsible for envisioning and executing innovative strategies to expand the company's market presence and drive revenue growth. Leveraging his deep understanding of market trends and customer needs, he plays a pivotal role in shaping the organization's long-term growth trajectory.

team.name: Tony D'Gracia
team.title: EVP - Northeast Operations
team.bio: Drawing on more than two decades of distinguished experience in law enforcement, investigations, and high-level security operations, Tony brings unparalleled expertise and strategic insight to the private security sector. During his extensive career in law enforcement and the private sector, Tony honed critical skills in tactical response, threat assessment, crisis management, and complex investigations. This foundation in public safety provided a deep understanding of proactive security measures and regulatory compliance that few in the private sector can match. Tony obtained a Bachelor’s degree in Criminal Justice from John Jay College of Criminal Justice, and holds multiple certifications including Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE) and NYS Security Guard Instructor.

team.name: Sevan Ohanians
team.title: VP - Event Operations
team.bio: Sevan Ohanians is an action-oriented and result-focused professional, offering 20+ years of experience in project management and operations management in fast paced environments. An expert in organization, completion, and project follow through. Extensive experience in managing high-profile clientele, risk assessment, and threat mitigation and leads our Events team on the West Coast. Sevan’s creative thinking and analytical mindset enable him to identify untapped markets and develop tailored solutions to meet customer demands. He thrives on building high-performing teams, fostering a collaborative work environment, and empowering his colleagues to achieve their full potential.
